ns0:entry.ns0:title: ColeMurray/background-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ColeMurray/background-agents
Language: typescript
An open-source background agents coding system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
Language: typescript
A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MadsLorentzen/ai-job-search
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MadsLorentzen/ai-job-search
Language: typescript
The job search that runs on your machine. AI job application framework built on Claude Code: evaluate postings, tailor CVs, write cover letters, prep interviews. Fork it and own it.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TencentCloud/TencentDB-Agent-Memory
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TencentCloud/TencentDB-Agent-Memory
Language: typescript
TencentDB Agent Memory delivers fully local long-term memory for AI Agents via a 4-tier progressive pipeline, with zero external API dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: actions/checkout
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/actions/checkout
Language: typescript
Action for checking out a repo

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/page-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/page-agent
Language: typescript
JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: babel/babel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/babel/babel
Language: typescript
🐠 Babel is a compiler for writing next generation JavaScript.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
Language: typescript
Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 231+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/astryx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/astryx
Language: typescript
An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-labs-code/stitch-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-labs-code/stitch-skills
Language: typescript
A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jamiepine/voicebox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jamiepine/voicebox
Language: typescript
The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mauriceboe/TREK
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mauriceboe/TREK
Language: typescript
A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/TypeScript
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript
Language: typescript
TypeScript is a superset of JavaScript that compiles to clean JavaScript output.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nestjs/nest
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nestjs/nest
Language: typescript
A progressive Node.js framework for building efficient, scalable, and enterprise-grade server-side applications with TypeScript/JavaScript 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: prisma/prisma
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/prisma/prisma
Language: typescript
Next-generation ORM for Node.js & TypeScript | PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, SQLite, MongoDB and CockroachDB

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stablyai/orca
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stablyai/orca
Language: typescript
Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
Language: typescript
This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
